title: [codereview] spec TOC and reference inconsistencies
description: After fixing numbering duplication in draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md TOC/references (9.1/9.2) and rule ID comment, review found: 1. References still use short form vs full citations in sibling drafts (schnorr:8.1, rpl:13.1). 2. Rule ID assignments now consistent in draft but still conflict with 03-adaptation.md:5.5 (which has Rule 2=MQTT-SN vs current Rule 7). Should consolidate canonical rules in one place (appendix-schc.md as source of truth) and update all references. This is P2 codereview finding from pass on TOC duplication fix. See project-LICHEN-6sn6.
